description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a weathered, industrial appearance, predominantly painted in a faded red color. The surface shows signs of rust, scratches, and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor or garage use. The top features a metallic valve assembly with a round knob, but no hose or nozzle is visible. White stenciled markings and partial text are present on the body, with a logo or symbol visible on one side. The extinguisher is constructed from metal, likely steel, and is designed to be robust and durable. Its overall form is utilitarian, with no visible mounting bracket or additional accessories attached.
description: A tall, cylindrical red fire extinguisher with a weathered, rusty surface and white stenciled markings. It features a metal valve on top but lacks a visible hose or mounting bracket.
description_view_0: Front view showing faded red paint, rust patches, and partial white stenciled text on the body.
description_view_1: Side view with more pronounced rust and wear, no visible markings or text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional white stenciled text, surface wear, and no visible accessories.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a white logo or symbol and more extensive stenciled text, with the valve assembly clearly visible on top.
attribute_label_or_signage: White stenciled text and a logo or symbol on the body, partially visible on the front and rear.
